languages.text: {n}Вместо ответа магос удивленно фыркает и громко называет свой первый ход. Но в этот раз вы точно знаете, какая именно тактика будет использована против вас.{/n}

traits.locale_text: Экзальт в шоке, что вы знаете его правила. Соглашается с интересом. Играете, Экзальт разыгрывает какой-то крутой гамбит шестеренки, но вы его предусмотрели и победили. Экзальт в шоке.

languages.text: {n}Instead of replying, Magos snorts in surprise and announces his first move loudly. But this time, you know exactly what tactics will be used against you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вместо ответа магос удивленно фыркает и громко называет свой первый ход. Но в этот раз вы точно знаете, какая именно тактика будет использована против вас.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Instead of replying, Magos snorts in surprise and announces his first move loudly. But this time, you know exactly what tactics will be used against you.{/n}
{n}Instead of replying, Magos snorts in surprise and announces his first move loudly. But this time, you know exactly what tactics will be used against you.{/n}
{n}Instead of replying, Magos snorts in surprise and announces his first move loudly. But this time, you know exactly what tactics will be used against you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}贤者并未回答，而是略带惊讶地哼了一声，高声报出他的第一步棋。但这一次，你对他将采用何种战术了如指掌。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Instead of replying, Magos snorts in surprise and announces his first move loudly. But this time, you know exactly what tactics will be used against you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}贤者并未回答，而是略带惊讶地哼了一声，高声报出他的第一步棋。但这一次，你对他将采用何种战术了如指掌。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Au lieu de répondre, le magos pousse une petite exclamation de surprise puis annonce son premier coup à voix haute. Cette fois, cependant, vous savez exactement quelles tactiques il va employer contre vous.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Instead of replying, Magos snorts in surprise and announces his first move loudly. But this time, you know exactly what tactics will be used against you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Au lieu de répondre, le magos pousse une petite exclamation de surprise puis annonce son premier coup à voix haute. Cette fois, cependant, vous savez exactement quelles tactiques il va employer contre vous.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Magos, cevap vermek yerine şaşkınlıkla homurdanıyor ve ilk hamlesini yüksek sesle bildiriyor. Ancak bu kez sana karşı hangi taktiklerle oynayacağını en ufak hamlesine kadar biliyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Instead of replying, Magos snorts in surprise and announces his first move loudly. But this time, you know exactly what tactics will be used against you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Magos, cevap vermek yerine şaşkınlıkla homurdanıyor ve ilk hamlesini yüksek sesle bildiriyor. Ancak bu kez sana karşı hangi taktiklerle oynayacağını en ufak hamlesine kadar biliyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}En lugar de responder, el magos resopla con incredulidad y anuncia su primer movimiento en voz alta. Esta vez, sabes exactamente qué tácticas usará contra ti.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Instead of replying, Magos snorts in surprise and announces his first move loudly. But this time, you know exactly what tactics will be used against you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}En lugar de responder, el magos resopla con incredulidad y anuncia su primer movimiento en voz alta. Esta vez, sabes exactamente qué tácticas usará contra ti.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Anstatt zu antworten, schnaubt Magos überrascht und sagt seinen ersten Zug laut an. Allerdings weißt du diesmal genau, welche Taktik er gegen dich einsetzen wird.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Instead of replying, Magos snorts in surprise and announces his first move loudly. But this time, you know exactly what tactics will be used against you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Anstatt zu antworten, schnaubt Magos überrascht und sagt seinen ersten Zug laut an. Allerdings weißt du diesmal genau, welche Taktik er gegen dich einsetzen wird.{/n}

languages.text: {n}マゴスは返答する代わりに、驚いて鼻を鳴らして、最初の手を大声で宣言する。しかし今回は、自分がどんな戦術で攻められるのか、正確に把握していた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Instead of replying, Magos snorts in surprise and announces his first move loudly. But this time, you know exactly what tactics will be used against you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}マゴスは返答する代わりに、驚いて鼻を鳴らして、最初の手を大声で宣言する。しかし今回は、自分がどんな戦術で攻められるのか、正確に把握していた。{/n}
